channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Massive pothole, 19th April
item.description:
All drivers are forced to drive over the pothole which covers a whole lane of the junction. This is made worse due to the roadworks and needs immediate attention. There are also potholes across the road. Specifically at the junction from Brockworth business park towards A417.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes on kidnappers lane, 18th April
item.description:
Near the entrance to Lotts Meadow. Huge potholes that could cause serious vehicle and tyre damage causing huge expenses to motorists.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 smaller potholes end of 61 Apple Orchard plus loads on roads around nr no, 18th April
item.description:
3 smaller potholes end of 61 Apple Orchard and loads more on roads around
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Apple Orchard, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Really deep pothole destroyed my cars shock absorber, 18th April
item.description:
Outside 8 pensylvania Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2;4;6;8;10;12, Lygon Walk, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights out ahain, 18th April
item.description:
No street lights ( more than 4 ) are working in Midwinter Avenue once again !! This is actually classed as an emergency on your reporting page so hopefully will be fixed ASAP as having to walk with NO street lights is not safe
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Midwinter Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 18th April
item.description:
Outside 43/45 Farmington Road, Benhall
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Farmington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost isn’t on, 18th April
item.description:
Opposite 68 Manser Street the lamppost isn’t on, this might be a temporary thing I’m not sure but it has caused that section to be really dark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Manser Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 18th April
item.description:
Between no 8-no.10

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Millbrook Street, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th April
item.description:
Various items dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Sycamore Court, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights not working on parabola road, 18th April
item.description:
Parabola road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parabola Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation encroaching onto footpath, 18th April
item.description:
The vegetation in the alleyway between Station Road and Barkers Leys is encroaching on the footpath more every year. It is predominantly brambles and nettles, and by the summer blocks a substantial part of the path. It also causes a significant nuisance to the adjoining garden at number 89 Station Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87A, Station Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed parts flytipped, 18th April
item.description:
Moved onto grass verge as causing a pavement obstruction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Montreal Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bicycle dumped in undergrowth, 18th April
item.description:
There is a bicycle dumped in undergrowth to the right of the Market Street ramp as it approaches the Honeybourne Line. There are visable signs of further rubbish down the bank.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small coffee table inconsiderately dumped on the corner of Marsh Drive directly outside 5 Marsh Gardens, 18th April
item.description:
Dumped here a few days ago, small, black and square.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Marsh Gardens, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th April
item.description:
Articles dumped off Frogfurlong Lane on side of access track.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frog Furlong Lane, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wobbly paving slabs outside 10 SRN, 18th April
item.description:
At least two paving slabs outside of the gate for 10 Sydenham Road North are wobbly and need relaying. They are in good condition, but need cementing in place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Sydenham Road North, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pair of holes, axle width apart, 18th April
item.description:
Close to another hole reported, a paid of holes. They're axle width apart so difficult to avoid without mounting the verge which is becoming damaged. Close to What3Words homeward.backup.crumble

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in road, 18th April
item.description:
Large hole outside the house at Little Colesbourne, the road between Colesbourne A435 and Withington Village. What3Words homeward.backup.crumble

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes all along the road, 18th April
item.description:
Road outside of Leckhampton High School
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farm Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lane sign vandalised and missing, 18th April
item.description:
Arden road Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Arden Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
